hero.headline: Logivisa
hero.subheadline: Structured visa pathway analysis and readiness reports for Australia.
trustIndicators.gov: Based on official Australian government sources
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Tell us your study, work, skilled, regional or partner pathway goal
howItWorks.step2: We compare your answers against structured visa information
howItWorks.step3: See pathways that may be relevant based on the stored information
howItWorks.step4: Speak with a registered migration agent if needed
pathways.title: Supported pathways
pathways.subtitle: The platform currently uses structured records for these seven visa pathways. Each summary is general information only and should be reviewed with a registered migration agent for personal circumstances.
pathways.500.title: 500 Student visa
pathways.500.text: Study in Australia through the current Student visa record.
pathways.482.title: 482 Skills in Demand
pathways.482.text: Employer sponsored work pathway using the Core Skills stream record.
pathways.189.title: 189 Skilled Independent
pathways.190.title: 190 Skilled Nominated
pathways.190.text: State or territory nominated skilled pathway information.
pathways.491.title: 491 Skilled Work Regional
pathways.820801.title: 820/801 Partner onshore
pathways.820801.text: Onshore partner pathway covering temporary 820 and permanent 801 stages.
pathways.485.title: 485 Temporary Graduate visa
pathways.485.text: Post-study temporary work pathway for recent graduates in Australia who meet relevant criteria.

compliance.title: Compliance Notice
compliance.text: This platform provides general information only. It does not make visa decisions, prepare applications, or replace professional review. For personal circumstances, speak with a registered migration agent or Australian legal practitioner.
referral.title: Need personalised help?
referral.text: We can help you request contact with a registered migration agent after you review general pathway information.
footer.disclaimer: For full legal information, view our
footer.generalInfo: This is general information only and not migration advice.

checker.title: Check my visa options
checker.subtitle: This questionnaire provides general information only and helps you explore possible pathways.
checker.sponsor: Do you have an Australian employer sponsor?
checker.familyInAustralia: Do you have a partner/family member in Australia?
results.heading: General pathway summary
results.title: Your mock pathway results
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, the following pathways may be relevant and could be worth reviewing with a registered migration agent.
results.nextText: You may want to gather missing documents and discuss these possible pathways with a registered migration agent before making visa decisions.
legal.heading: Legal and Compliance
legal.title: Information use and platform boundaries
legal.subtitle: This platform is designed for general pathway information only. It is not a migration advice or legal advice service.
legal.whatDoesText1: Provides general pathway summaries using structured public visa data.
legal.whatDoesText2: Highlights missing information and discussion points for your next step.
legal.whatDoesText3: Offers optional referral pathways to registered migration professionals.
legal.whatDoesNot: What this platform does not do
legal.whatDoesNotText1: Does not provide migration advice or legal advice.
legal.whatDoesNotText2: Does not confirm visa outcomes or application results.
legal.whatDoesNotText3: Does not replace consultation with a registered migration agent.
hero.noCreditCard: 🔒 No credit card required for Beta
fullCheck.whatYouGet.title: What you'll get
quiz.progress.hint: Click an answer to advance automatically
quiz.q1.text: How old are you right now?
quiz.q1.hint: Age is worth up to 30 points — the single largest category in Australia's points test.
quiz.q2.text: What is your current English proficiency?
quiz.q2.hint: Upgrading from Competent to Superior English alone can add 20 points to your PR application.
quiz.q3.text: Is your occupation on Australia's skilled occupation list?
quiz.q3.hint: Only MLTSSL or STSOL occupations are eligible for General Skilled Migration pathways.
quiz.q3.a: I've never heard of the MLTSSL list
quiz.q3.b: I think so, but haven't confirmed with an assessing body
quiz.q3.c: Yes — I have a positive skills assessment
quiz.q3.d: My occupation is only on a state-specific list
quiz.q4.text: How open are you to living in regional Australia?
quiz.q4.hint: A 491 regional nomination adds 15 bonus points — often the difference between waiting years and getting invited now.
quiz.q4.a: Not a chance — Sydney or Melbourne only
quiz.q4.b: Maybe, if it genuinely speeds up my PR
quiz.q4.c: Genuinely open to it for 2–3 years
quiz.q4.d: I'm already living in or near a regional area
quiz.q5.text: What is your partner's migration situation?
quiz.q5.hint: A partner with a valid skills assessment and Competent English adds 5 bonus points to your profile.
quiz.q5.a: I'm applying as a single applicant
quiz.q5.b: My partner hasn't completed a skills assessment
quiz.q5.c: My partner has a skills assessment & Competent English
quiz.q5.d: This doesn't apply to my situation
quiz.q6.text: How many total years of skilled work experience do you have?
quiz.q6.hint: 8+ years overseas earns 15 points. 5+ years of Australian skilled work earns 20 points.
quiz.q7.text: Have you researched state or territory nomination?
quiz.q7.hint: 190 nomination adds 5 points. 491 regional nomination adds 15. Most applicants skip this critical research.
quiz.q7.a: Not at all — I haven't looked into it
quiz.q7.b: I've heard of it but don't know my options
quiz.q7.c: I've researched 1–2 states that match my profile
quiz.q7.d: I've already applied or received a state nomination
quiz.q8.text: What worries you most about your PR journey?
quiz.q8.hint: Your answer calibrates the single biggest risk factor LogiVisa AI will flag in your result.
quiz.q8.a: I don't know if I actually have enough points
quiz.q8.b: My occupation might not be eligible for PR
quiz.q8.c: The process feels too slow and too expensive
quiz.q8.d: I'm scared of picking the wrong visa and wasting time
quiz.loading.title: LogiVisa AI is analyzing your 8 data points
quiz.loading.subtitle: Cross-referencing your profile against current invitation rounds
quiz.result.headlinePart3: , but your current strategy might be risking your chances.
quiz.result.body: Based on your 8 answers, LogiVisa AI has identified gaps in your pathway strategy that most applicants never discover until it's too late. Your full report reveals your exact points score, your occupation's historical invitation trends, and the key factors that could strengthen your profile.
quiz.result.cta: Unlock Your Full AI Readiness Report & Exact Points (Free)
quiz.result.trust: No credit card · No sign-up required · 2-minute report
quiz.result.disclaimer: LogiVisa is an automated analysis tool, not a registered migration agent. Results are for educational purposes.
quiz.result.share: Know someone on the PR journey? Share this quiz with them.
quiz.meta.title: Australian PR Readiness Quiz — Discover Your Hidden PR Score in 2 Minutes
quiz.meta.description: Take our 8-question AI quiz to find your Australian PR readiness score, uncover hidden points, and see exactly which visa pathway is most likely to get you invited in 2026.
quiz.meta.ogTitle: Are You Actually Ready for Australian PR? Take the 2-Minute Quiz
quiz.meta.ogDescription: 8 questions. Instant AI analysis. Discover your hidden PR points and the exact visa pathway that fits your profile.
